entities.name: RESILIENT DRYLAND SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems designed to reduce vulnerability to environmental stressors in dryland regions

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A period of deficient rainfall leading to water shortage

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in global temperatures and weather patterns

entities.name: CROP DIVERSITY
entities.description: The practice of growing a variety of different crops to improve system resilience

entities.name: VALUE
entities.description: The economic and nutritional benefit derived from agricultural production

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Center for Semi-Arid Tropics, an organization focusing on dryland agriculture

entities.name: HUMAN ACTIVITY
entities.description: Actions by humans that contribute to environmental changes

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSION
entities.description: The release of gases that contribute to the greenhouse effect

entities.name: GLOBAL WARMING
entities.description: The increase in Earth's average surface temperature

entities.name: GLOBAL CLIMATE PATTERNS
entities.description: The systemic distribution of weather and climate across the planet

entities.name: DEVELOPING WORLD
entities.description: Regions characterized by lower industrialization and economic development
